steps.text: Output mappers use regex to auto-mask patterns in responses. Example: '\b[A-Z0-9]{32}\b' catches 32-char API keys.
Set a prefix like 'api_key_' to generate 'api_key_1', 'api_key_2', etc. Add your mapper.
Use 'Preview' to test your regex before applying - paste sample output to see what gets masked!
